title: Dave Inc Q2 2025 Earnings: Revenue Surges 64%, Company Raises Guidance
text:
Dave reported $132 million in total revenue, representing a 64% year-over-year increase. The company achieved non-GAAP gross profit of $92 million, up 78% YoY, with adjusted EBITDA surging 236% to $51 million and an adjusted EBITDA margin of 39%.

Raised Full-Year Guidance:
- Total Revenue: $505-$515 million (previously $460-$475 million), representing 46-48% YoY growth
- Adjusted EBITDA: $180-$190 million (previously $155-$165 million), representing 108-120% YoY growth

Key Performance Metrics:
- Monthly Transacting Members (MTMs): Increased 16% YoY
- ExtraCash origination volume: $1.79 billion, up 51% YoY
- Average ExtraCash size: $206, up 24% YoY
- Average revenue per advance: $13.0, up 42% YoY
- Annualized revenue per MTM: $200, up 42% YoY
- Dave Card spend volumes: $493 million, up 27% YoY
- Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC): $19 in Q2, with payback period improving from 5 to 4 months

Market Opportunity: Dave highlighted that 68% of consumers were living paycheck-to-paycheck in June 2025, up from 57% in 2021, with the total addressable market estimated at approximately 180 million customers.
